ham.subject: Transaction Alert: $250.00 Debited from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear John Doe,

We wish to inform you that a debit of $250.00 was made from your checking account (Account #123456789) on 15 April 2026 at 3:45 PM. The transaction was for a purchase at "ABC Electronics".

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our customer support immediately at <URL> or call 1-800-123-4567.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Bank Support Team

spam.subject: Congratulations! You Have Been Awarded a $10,000 Scholarship!
spam.body:
Dear Jane Smith,

We are delighted to inform you that you have been selected as a recipient of the prestigious XYZ University Scholarship Fund. Your academic achievements and community service have impressed our selection committee.

To claim your scholarship, please verify your personal information by clicking the secure link below:

<URL>

Please complete the verification within 48 hours to secure your award. Failure to do so may result in forfeiture of the scholarship.

Best regards,
Office of Financial Aid
XYZ University
